steps.title: Find the shared trait
steps.content: The passage identifies Blackbird as Blackfeet and a horror writer. It then says Dufresne is a Métis author who has also written in the genre, so the shared trait must apply to both authors.

steps.title: Reject unsupported matches
steps.content: A applies Blackfeet characters to both authors, but that detail is given only for Blackbird. B says both are Blackfeet, though Dufresne is identified as Metis. D invents reading preferences. The shared trait is Indigenous horror authorship. The answer is C.
